_instructions: These 8 questions are grounded STARTERS against your real corpus (data/sample_corpus).
Expand this to 15-30 questions for full eval credit — the brief requires a fixed 15-30 set.
For each question, mark the GOLD (truly relevant) chunk(s) via gold_chunks [{source, chunk_index}].
Run `python -m src.cli chunks` to see every chunk's source/chunk_index/id if you re-chunk.
gold_answer is OPTIONAL: provide it to enable Exact-Match / F1 scoring.
IMPORTANT: gold chunk_index values assume the current chunk settings (500/50). If you change
CHUNK_SIZE_TOKENS/CHUNK_OVERLAP_TOKENS, re-ingest and re-check indices with `src.cli chunks`.
Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the harness.

questions.question: What is DualCast and what problem does it solve?
questions.gold_answer: DualCast is a privacy-preserving, real-time AI commentary generation system for eSports.

questions.question: What sampling temperature does DualCast use for commentary generation, and why?
questions.gold_answer: Temperature 0.8, for controlled randomness that avoids hallucination while allowing variety.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the NavDrishti smart stick?
questions.gold_answer: NavDrishti is an AI-powered smart stick application that assists visually impaired users with navigation.

questions.question: How does NavDrishti avoid repeating the same audio warning?
questions.gold_answer: A per-class cooldown so the same detection type won't repeat within 20 seconds, plus a global cooldown of at most one warning per second.

questions.question: Which AI model does TerraVision use, and for what?
questions.gold_answer: Google Gemini AI, to provide intelligent urban sustainability planning insights.

questions.question: How does TerraVision generate a transformed image using Gemini?
questions.gold_answer: Convert the image to Base64, send it to Gemini with a transformation prompt requesting TEXT and IMAGE response modalities, then extract the generated image and text.

questions.question: What type of system is Vote Rakshak?
Which API endpoint is used to cast a vote in Vote Rakshak?
